title: Forgotten Power
description: Abilities, reforged weapons, new dimensions - discover the power long forgotten
body:
# Forgotten Power
**Forgotten Power** is an adventure–RPG modpack focused on **abilities, subclasses, powerful weapons, and new worlds to explore**.
Fight through expanded dimensions, unlock unique combat styles, and discover ancient magic long lost to time.

### Features
- **RPG Progression**: Choose unique abilities, origins, and playstyles.
- **Expanded Combat**: New weapon types, enhanced gear, and reworked netherite.
- **Modular Crafting**: Use Tetra, Silent Gear, and addons to forge truly custom equipment.
- **New Dimensions**: Explore the Otherside, Undergarden, and Better End for late-game challenges.
- **Stronger Enemies**: Face tougher mobs and bosses designed around your growing power.
- **Smooth Exploration**: World improvements, QoL features, and beautiful biomes.

### Included Mods

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- Advanced Netherite
- Appleskin
- Art by Forging: A Tetra Addon
- Better Advancements
- Better Statistic Screen
- Better End
- Carry On
- Clumps
- Controlling
- Cubes Without Borders
- Curios
- Deeper and Darker
- Embeddium (Extra)
- Entity Culling
- Equipment Compare
- Full Brightness Toggle
- Geophilic
- ImmediatelyFast
- Jade
- JEI (JER)

+APIs and Libs
